creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Thu, 11 Mar 1999, Howard Goldstein wrote:

> Indeed it's there.  Could it be I was over vic's quota of 6 anonymous
> logins when it failed on me yesterday?

Absolutly, you'll get a "Not logged in" error. If there is a site with
only 6 users, there should be some serious backup MASTER_SITES, and the
low-user site should be moved to the bottom of the list.

- bill fumerola - billf@chc-chimes.com - BF1560 - computer horizons corp -
